title: Monday.com for Project management - we need your help!
excerpt:
Hi guys, 
We’re currently on the hunt for anyone who uses monday for project management and has set up successful template boards for the following use cases: 


Project plan 


Communication plan 


Project timesheet 


…

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

We’re currently on the hunt for anyone who uses monday for project management and has set up successful template boards for the following use cases:

  1. Project plan

  2. Communication plan

  3. Project timesheet

  4. Project budget

  5. Resource plan

If you think you have something you’d be happy to share with us, please reach me in private or feel free to post some information here (including a screenshot of the board/s) and we’ll take it from there!

Thanks so much guys!

posts.author: johnnymiller (john)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Julia,
I manage software deployments and have one of this but struggling with other aspects. Keen to discuss!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @johnnymiller

Cool to hear that!

We might actually be interested to see some of your other boards which are working well for you as well as ones from the list above as we’re also doing research into R&D teams in parallel.

Would love to pass your details along to my team mates @brett-monday.com and @lindsay-monday.com.

They’ll be in touch to talk further about this.

Cheers,
Julia

posts.author: Danny (DIGITAL STEAM)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Julia
I use Monday.com extensively as a PM
However, I tend to keep it uni-dimensional for now; I use the group tasks (pulses) and assign them to users with a convenient set of columns for tracking. I also use the timeline view.
As you know, I do hope to see sub-tasks and better reporting capability come from Monday.com. By reporting, I mean, users need a clearer we to know what’s assigned to them and what’s do. There’s a lot of work to be done here on your part but I see it’s evolving towards that.
Please let me know if you want/need my participation further in this. I would be glad to assist.
Danny

posts.author: lindsay-monday.com (Lindsay Mayrose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Danny,

Thanks so much for being willing to help! Would you mind sending me an email at lindsay@monday.com? We would love to discuss what you have set up on the platform a bit further to get a sense of how you’re using it.

Thanks!
Lindsay
